structural_notes: All 3 guides are specialization tracks of the MSDA program. All share a 7-course Data Analytics core ([Data Analytics] group). Specialization content appears as the second or third AoS group.
MSDADPE has 3 AoS groups (the only one with 3) — [Data Analytics], [IT Management], [Decision Process Engineering]. Still parses identically.
No new parser logic needed. Graduate 3-column multiline + footer metadata is the pre-validated pattern.
Footer metadata (page_count=11) produces page_count=11 in parsed output as expected.
